title: struthiopteris werckleana
intro: Struthiopteris werckleana, also known as Wercklean's Struthiopteris, is a type of fern native to New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Struthiopteris werckleana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and processing the fronds, which can be made into teas, infusions, or used in tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
